get.summary:
Returns the latest version per MBA number only.
Paging is enforced at the query level; schedule stripping happens on the
paged items (max per_page rows), never on the full table.
get.description:
Returns the latest version per MBA number only. Paging is enforced at the query level; schedule stripping happens on the paged items (max per_page rows), never on the full table.

Authentication: not required

parameters.name: campaign_status
parameters.description: Optional status filter (e.g., "Active", "Draft").

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Enforced by the query.

parameters.name: include_schedules
parameters.description: If true, includes deliverySchedule and billingSchedule in the response.
